JUDGE PRO TEM:MORGAN PRICKETT, REPTR:BRENDA FIELDS; CLERK:ECLAVERIA 2:25PM: CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE AND CASE SETTLED. PRESENT: PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL MARK EPSTEIN AND DEFT HARVEY RUSHING, APPEARING PROPER. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT ENTERED ON RECORD BY PLFF'S COUNSEL AS FOLLOWS: THERE SHALL BE A JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 2306 MARKET STREET, APT. 303, SF, CA. WRIT SHALL ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT EXECUTION SHAL BE STAYED TO 2/5/95. DEFENDANT FORFEITS THE SECURITY DEPOSIT AND KEYS SHALL BE DELIVERED ON OR BEFORE FEB. 5, 1995; PREMISES BE RETURNED IN GOOD CONDITION EXCEPT FOR NORMAL WEAR AND TEAR. IF DEFT VACATES THE PREMISES RENT DUE WAIVED BY PLAINATIFF PROVIDED THE PREMISES VACATED BE IN GOOD CONDITION - SECURITY DEPOSIT RETAINED BY PALINTIFF. DEFENDANT UNDERSTOOD AND AGREED ON THE AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENTD.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR, SETTLED AT SETT. CONF. ON 1/12/95.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUSHING, HARVEY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2306 MARKET STREET, APT.303, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL FEB-05-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, SECURITY DEPOSITS PAID BY DEFT FORFEITED.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
